issue_title: Elk visualisation for stock-flow with signed links breaks model
issue_body_preview:
Following https://github.com/ToposInstitute/CatColab/pull/1019, switching the visualisation setting to "Elk" for a stock-flow diagram with signed links gives an error:

```
Error: No program in Graphviz for layout engine: elk
```

This also means that I can no longer open the analysis document to sw
test_description_zh: 在 CatColab 中创建一个带有签名链接（signed links）的 stock-flow 图表，然后将可视化设置切换为 'Elk' 布局引擎，观察图表是否正常渲染。同时验证该模型的分析文档能否正常打开。
expected_result_zh: 切换为 Elk 布局引擎后，stock-flow 图表应正常渲染显示，不出现任何错误提示（如 'No program in Graphviz for layout engine: elk'）。相关的分析文档也应能正常打开和查看。
